sentences.target: Ich finde die Zange gerade nicht.

translations.de: Ich finde die Zange gerade nicht.
translations.en: I can't find the pliers right now.
translations.es: Ahora mismo no encuentro los alicates.
translations.fr: Je ne trouve pas les pinces pour l’instant.
translations.it: Non riesco a trovare le pinze adesso.
translations.ru: Я сейчас не могу найти плоскогубцы.
translations.pt: Não consigo encontrar o alicate agora.
translations.he: אני לא מוצא את הצבת עכשיו.
translations.vi: Bây giờ tôi không tìm thấy cái kìm.
translations.nl: Ik kan de tang nu niet vinden.
translations.uk: Я зараз не можу знайти плоскогубці.
translations.hi: मैं अभी प्लायर नहीं ढूँढ पा रहा हूँ.
translations.el: Δεν μπορώ να βρω την πένσα τώρα.
translations.nb: Jeg finner ikke tangen akkurat nå.
translations.id: Aku tidak bisa menemukan tang sekarang.
translations.sv: Jag kan inte hitta tången just nu.
translations.da: Jeg kan ikke finde tangen lige nu.
translations.ja: 今ペンチが見つからない。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb ('finde').
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person singular; transitive and governs the accusative object ('die Zange').
Definite article, accusative feminine singular; determiner of 'Zange'.
Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as direct object of 'finde'.
Adverb of time; modifies the verb phrase to indicate the current moment.
Negation particle; negates the proposition (here the VP headed by 'finde').

sentences.target: Er zieht den Nagel mit der Zange.
sentences.reading: /eːɐ tsiːt deːn ˈnaːɡl̩ mɪt deːɐ ˈtsaŋə/

translations.de: Er zieht den Nagel mit der Zange.
translations.ipa: /eːɐ tsiːt deːn ˈnaːɡl̩ mɪt deːɐ ˈtsaŋə/
translations.en: He pulls the nail with the pliers.
translations.es: Saca el clavo con los alicates.
translations.fr: Il arrache le clou avec une pince.
translations.it: Tira fuori il chiodo con le pinze.
translations.zh-Hans: 他用钳子把钉子拔出来。
translations.pt: Ele arranca o prego com o alicate.
translations.he: הוא שולף את המסמר עם הצבת.
translations.vi: Anh ấy dùng kìm nhổ cái đinh ra.
translations.nl: Hij trekt de spijker eruit met de tang.
translations.hi: वह प्लायर से कील निकाल रहा है.
translations.el: Βγάζει το καρφί με την πένσα.
translations.nb: Han drar ut spikeren med tangen.
translations.sv: Han drar ut spiken med tången.
translations.da: Han trækker sømmet ud med tangen.
translations.ja: 彼はペンチで釘を抜いている。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject of 'zieht'.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; transitive, takes 'den Nagel' as accusative object; instrument expressed by PP 'mit der Zange'.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Nagel'.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as direct object of 'zieht'.
Preposition selecting dative; introduces an instrumental phrase.
Definite article, dative feminine singular; determiner of 'Zange' after the preposition 'mit'.
Common noun, feminine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'mit' (instrument).

sentences.target: Die Zange liegt neben dem Werkzeugkasten.

translations.de: Die Zange liegt neben dem Werkzeugkasten.
translations.en: The pliers are lying next to the toolbox.
translations.es: Los alicates están al lado de la caja de herramientas.
translations.fr: Les pinces sont à côté de la boîte à outils.
translations.it: Le pinze sono accanto alla cassetta degli attrezzi.
translations.ru: Плоскогубцы лежат рядом с ящиком для инструментов.
translations.pt: O alicate está ao lado da caixa de ferramentas.
translations.vi: Cái kìm nằm cạnh hộp dụng cụ.
translations.nl: De tang ligt naast de gereedschapskist.
translations.uk: Плоскогубці лежать поруч із ящиком для інструментів.
translations.hu: A fogó a szerszámosláda mellett van.
translations.hi: प्लायर औज़ारों के बक्से के पास रखा है.
translations.pl: Kombinerki leżą obok skrzynki z narzędziami.
translations.el: Η πένσα είναι δίπλα στην εργαλειοθήκη.
translations.nb: Tangen ligger ved siden av verktøykassen.
translations.id: Tang tergeletak di sebelah kotak alat.
translations.ro: Cleștele e lângă cutia cu scule.
translations.cs: Kleště leží vedle skříňky na nářadí.
translations.da: Tangen ligger ved siden af værktøjskassen.
translations.ja: ペンチは工具箱の隣に置いてある。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative feminine singular; determiner of the subject 'Zange'.
Common noun, feminine; nominative singular functioning as subject.
Finite verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; intransitive, denotes location/state.
Preposition selecting dative; forms a locative PP.
Definite article, dative masculine singular; determiner of 'Werkzeugkasten' after 'neben'.
Compound common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'neben'.

sentences.target: Wir brauchen noch eine Zange für den Grill.
sentences.reading: /viːɐ ˈbʁaʊxən nɔx ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtsaŋə fyːɐ deːn ɡʁɪl/

translations.de: Wir brauchen noch eine Zange für den Grill.
translations.ipa: /viːɐ ˈbʁaʊxən nɔx ˈaɪ̯nə ˈtsaŋə fyːɐ deːn ɡʁɪl/
translations.en: We still need tongs for the grill.
translations.es: Todavía necesitamos unas pinzas para la parrilla.
translations.fr: Il nous faut encore des pinces pour le barbecue.
translations.it: Ci servono ancora delle pinze per la griglia.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们还需要一个烧烤夹。
translations.yue: 我哋仲需要一把燒烤夾。
translations.ru: Нам всё ещё нужны щипцы для гриля.
translations.pt: Ainda precisamos de um pegador para o churrasco.
translations.tr: Hâlâ ızgara için bir maşa lazım.
translations.vi: Chúng ta vẫn cần một cái kẹp cho bếp nướng.
translations.ar: ما زلنا بحاجة إلى ملقط للشواية.
translations.nl: We hebben nog een tang voor de barbecue nodig.
translations.uk: Нам ще потрібні щипці для грилю.
translations.hi: हमें ग्रिल के लिए अभी भी चिमटा चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειαζόμαστε ακόμα μια λαβίδα για την ψησταριά.
translations.id: Kita masih perlu penjepit untuk panggangan.
translations.ro: Mai avem nevoie de un clește pentru grătar.
translations.ja: バーベキュー用のトングがまだ必要だ。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of 'brauchen'.
Finite verb, present indicative 1st person plural; transitive, governs an accusative object ('eine Zange').
Adverb indicating addition; modifies the clause to convey an additional need.

Common noun, feminine; accusative singular as direct object of 'brauchen'.
Preposition selecting accusative; introduces a purpose/beneficiary PP.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Grill' after 'für'.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the object of the preposition 'für'.
